title: Dish Drainer Rack, Small Dish Drainer, Expandable Dish Rack With Removable Cutlery Holder, Anti Rust Small Drying Rack for Sink, Compact Draining Board Rack For Kitchen Counter, White
description: Name: Compact Dish Drainer Material: Main Rack: Made from premium anti-rust stainless steel, ensuring durability and longevity, even in wet conditions. Cutlery Holder and Drainer Board: Made of durable plastic for easy cleaning and organization. Non-Slip Feet: Rubber feet provide stability and prevent slipping or scratching on countertops. Functions: Compact Design: Designed to fit small kitchen countertops, this dish drainer is ideal for compact spaces without sacrificing functionality. It efficiently holds plates, cups, bowls, and utensils. Expandable: The rack expands to accommodate more dishes when needed, providing extra drying space while still maintaining its compact footprint when not extended. Removable Cutlery Holder: The detachable holder offers convenient storage for forks, knives, and spoons, allowing easy cleaning and organization. Non-Slip Feet: Ensures stability on the countertop, preventing movement during use and protecting surfaces from scratches. Anti-Rust: The rack’s high-quality anti-rust coating guarantees resistance to corrosion, ensuring long-term use in humid kitchen environments. Features: Stylish Pink Finish: Adds a pop of color to your kitchen while maintaining a functional, clean look. Space-Saving Solution: Ideal for small spaces, this drying rack offers efficient storage without overwhelming your countertop. Easy to Clean: The removable parts make cleaning the entire drainer quick and hassle-free.
